abilities.name: Butterfly Jump
abilities.text: After resolving an enemy attack action targeting this model, this model may move up to 3".

abilities.name: Celebrity
abilities.text: After this model resolves the Interact action, it may choose an enemy model within 6" to gain an Entranced token.

abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

actions.name: The Flaming Fist of the Amazing Carlos Vasquez
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has a Burning token, this action receives a (+).
actions.effects: If this action receives a raise, this model may move up to 2".

triggers.name: Whirlwind Attack
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (t)2" of this model.

triggers.name: Blaze
triggers.text: Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token.

actions.name: Breath of Fire
actions.effects: Deal this action's damage to a different enemy model within 2" of the target. Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Up In Flames
triggers.text: Remove all Scheme markers within (t)2" of the target.

actions.name: The Dance of Flame
actions.effects: This model may move up to 5", ignoring vertical distance. Then, enemy models within (t)2" of this model must pass a TN 14 Df duel or gain a Burning token.
